negative_cases.why_wrong: Deterministic Mismatch DAC6: forces the output low and misses every nonzero weighted code.
Deterministic Mismatch DAC6: ignores the public deterministic element mismatch coefficients.
Deterministic Mismatch DAC6: applies the mismatch coefficients with the wrong sign.
Deterministic Mismatch DAC6: assigns MSB and LSB weights to the wrong input pins.
Deterministic Mismatch DAC6: uses the nominal binary full-scale sum instead of normalizing by actual mismatched weights.
